channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260519)
item.description:
What's New

feat: dual event tap for remote desktop Vietnamese input support

  • Add secondary session-level tap to capture remote desktop events

that bypass HID-level tap (enables Vietnamese typing on Machine B

when accessed via RustDesk, TeamViewer, Jump Desktop, etc.)

  • Add kXKeyHIDSeenMarker for deduplication between HID and session taps
  • Restore clean eventSourceUserData before passing to downstream apps
  • Add comprehensive passthrough list for remote desktop clients
  • Use case-insensitive bundle ID matching for passthrough robustness
  • Update build version to 20260519

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
